title: Herb Grinders, Large Spice Crusher 63mm, 4 Layers Metal Grinder with Pollen Scraper and Brush, for Spices, Herbs & Tea, Black Gift Box (Popcorn)
features: 1. Stylish & Gift-Ready. Featuring a stunning fun food design, this grinder is both functional and visually striking. Packaged in a elegant black gift box, it’s a perfect and thoughtful gift for friends and family.

2. Large & Secure. With a 2.5-inch (63mm) diameter, this grinder offers ample space to grind more herbs at once. The strong magnetic lid ensures a secure fit, preventing spills and making grinding smooth and hassle-free.
3. Sharp & Efficient. Equipped with ultra-sharp teeth, this grinder delivers a consistent and effortless grind every time. Includes a handy scraper and brush for easy cleaning and maintenance.
4. Versatile Use. Designed to handle a variety of dry herbs and spices, the sharp, curved teeth and smooth rotation make grinding quick and efficient.
5. Hassle-Free Guarantee. We stand behind our product with a satisfaction guarantee. If you’re not completely happy, contact us for support—your satisfaction is our priority.
